title: Pipedream Component Structure
description: Structural summary of Pipedream Component as exposed by the Pipedream API.

key.description: The key that uniquely identifies the component.

name.description: The human-readable name of the component, e.g. 'GitLab: List Commits'

version.description: The latest version of the component, in SemVer format.

component_type.description: The type of component (trigger or action)
